name: Enshrouded
author: vapokrocks@gmail.com
description: Enshrouded dedicated server. Survival, crafting, and Action RPG for up to 16 players.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Enshrouded - SteamCMD + Proton
set -e
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
export HOME=/mnt/server
[[ -z "$STEAM_USER" ]] && STEAM_USER=anonymous
[[ -z "$STEAM_PASS" ]] && STEAM_PASS=""
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login $STEAM_USER $STEAM_PASS +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID:-2278520} validate +quit
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32 /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/ 2>/dev/null || true
cd /mnt/server
if [[ ! -f enshrouded_server.json ]]; then
  echo '{"name":"Enshrouded Server","password":"","saveDirectory":"./savegame","logDirectory":"./logs","ip":"0.0.0.0","gamePort":15636,"queryPort":15637,"slotCount":16}' > enshrouded_server.json
fi
echo Installation completed.
